title: Picual EVOO Premium Gift Pack - Two 500ml Bottles
description: Gift pack of two 500ml bottles of single-estate Picual extra virgin olive oil, grown and cold-pressed on Finca Miles in Baena, Córdoba. Presented in a kraft gift box with harvest card. Early-harvest oil with a peppery, green-fruity profile. Each batch is from a single estate, so colour and intensity vary with the harvest.
tags: olive oil gift,extra virgin olive oil,picual EVOO,single estate oil,gourmet gift,spanish olive oil,Cordoba

title: Single-Estate Picual EVOO - 250ml Tin
description: Single-estate Picual extra virgin olive oil in a 250ml tin from Finca Miles, Baena. The tin protects the oil from light and keeps it fresh longer—ideal for the kitchen or as a small gift. Intense green-fruity aroma with a peppery finish. Cold-pressed on the estate within hours of harvest.
tags: olive oil tin,picual EVOO,250ml olive oil,single estate,gourmet oil,spanish EVOO,artisan food

title: Deluxe Picual & Hojiblanca Trio Gift Pack
description: Deluxe gift pack with three 500ml bottles—two Picual and one Hojiblanca—all single-estate from Finca Miles in the Subbética hills of Córdoba. Presented in a rigid gift box with tasting notes. A complete tasting set showing the contrast between the peppery Picual and the milder, almond-toned Hojiblanca. Each batch varies a little with the harvest.

title: Single-Estate Hojiblanca EVOO - 500ml Bottle
description: Single-estate Hojiblanca extra virgin olive oil in a 500ml bottle from Finca Miles, Baena. A softer, rounder oil than our Picual, with notes of ripe almond and green tomato and a gentle bitterness. Cold-pressed on the estate. A lovely introduction to single-variety Andalusian oil.
